details: J Med Chem 2013 (DOI 10.1021/jm3014162) confirmed via 2013_Zhou PDF. Quote 'desired product as a pale yellow solid (20 mg, 36%); mp 74-75 °C' found verbatim under section '2-Ethyl-1-(2,4,6-trimethylbenzenesulfonyl)-1H-pyrrole (20a)'. Compound code 20a matches.

J Org Chem 2006 (DOI 10.1021/jo061443+) confirmed in 2006_Sharik PDF. Quote 'afforded 0.36 g (68%) of the major diastereomer as a white solid mp 49–51 °C' found verbatim under section for compound 21a heading.
Molecules 2003 (DOI 10.3390/80700541) confirmed. Quote starting 'Compound 17 was obtained as brown crystals (45%), mp 200°C' verbatim in Experimental for compound 17.
Molecules 2024 29(12):2839 (DOI 10.3390/molecules29122839) confirmed. Quote '(75% yield) with mp 146–148 °C' verbatim under compound 8g heading.
PMC7148931 confirmed in metadata. Quote 'Yield, 67%, dark yellow crystalline solid, mp 235–237 °C' verbatim under section 2.2.3.5 for compound V5.
Molecules 2024 31(4):706 (DOI 10.3390/molecules31040706) confirmed. Quote '( 1h ). Yield: 78%; Mp: 85 °C' verbatim for compound 1h.
Pharmaceuticals (DOI 10.3390/ph19020239) confirmed. Quote with '( 5d ) Yield: 72.8%; Color: light yellow solid; Melting Point: 173–174 °C' verbatim under section 3.2.7 for compound 5d.
PMC6264341 confirmed in metadata (DOI 10.3390/molecules16108758). Quote '( 11b ). Yield 50%; brown yellowish solid; C 42 H 56 N 6 S 10 ; mp: 118–120 °C' verbatim for compound 11b.
Molecules 2003 (DOI 10.3390/80100186) confirmed. Quote '( 4f ). Yield 44.4%; m.p. 110-111°C' verbatim for compound 4f.
Molecules 2024 31(4):706 confirmed. Quote '( 5j ). Yield: 79%; Mp: 154 °C' verbatim for compound 5j.
Pharmaceuticals (DOI 10.3390/ph19020256) confirmed. Quote '( 34 ) was obtained with a 64% yield; mp. 248 °C' verbatim for compound 34.

BMC Chem 2025 (DOI 10.1186/s13065-025-01402-8) confirmed. Quote text matches paper 'A white precipitate was obtained in a yield of 71%; mp 200–202 °C' under compound 10j. However the CSV compound_name begins '10j (Methyl-2-(4-...' while the paper names the compound 'Ethyl-2-(4-((2-(2-(5,6-dichloro-2-(4-methoxyphenyl)-1 H -benzo[ d ]imidazol-1-yl)acetyl) hydrazono)methyl)phenoxy)propanoate (10j)' — i.e. the ester is ethyl, not methyl. Compound name discrepancy.

J Med Chem 2013 (DOI 10.1021/jm3014162) confirmed. Quote 'The title compound was obtained as a white solid (mp 139-141 °C)' verbatim under section '1-(2,4,6-Trimethylbenzenesulfonyl)-1H-pyrrolo[2,3-b]pyridine (24d)'.

Molecules 2003 (DOI 10.3390/80700541) confirmed. Quote ending 'Compound 25 was obtained as yellow crystals (65%), mp 256°C' verbatim. Section heading lists '3-(Benzocumarin-3/-yl)-pyrazole (23)' so paper text inconsistently calls it 25 — extraction faithfully reflects paper text for the compound described as 3-(Benzocumarin-3'-yl)-pyrazole.
Int J Mol Sci 2023 (DOI 10.3390/ijms242216359) confirmed. Quote '(11a). Yield 162 mg (51%); white powder; mp: 258–260 °C' verbatim for compound 11a.
Molecules 2001 (DOI 10.3390/60300194) confirmed. Quote 'recrystallised from n-hexane to yield the title product as pale yellow crystals (38 g, 45%), m.p. 78-79 °C' verbatim for compound 3.
Molecules 2002 (DOI 10.3390/70200124) confirmed. Quote 'anti - 1e (14%, m.p.156-157°C)' verbatim within composite Experimental sentence about N-(3-Oxoalkyl)amides.

PMC6259131 confirmed (DOI 10.3390/molecules15106759). Quote '(5-Benzyl-4-phenyl-4H-[1,2,4]triazol-3-thiomethyl)-carbamic acid methyl ester ( 14 ). From MeOH (0.04 g). Colourless crystals (0.22 g, 62%); mp 54 °C' verbatim for compound 14.
PMC3685236 confirmed. Quote 'PI-4. 1-Ethoxyethyl-2-bromoethanoate: C 6 H 11 O 3 Br; M w = 211.05; Boiling point: 85 °C (3 mm Hg); IR (Film) : ν̄ max (cm −1 )' verbatim for compound PI-4.

J Org Chem 2019 (DOI 10.1021/acs.joc.9b00711) confirmed via 2019_Rubstov PDF. Quote 'Yellow solid; 1.89 g, 92 % yield; m.p. 283-285 °С (acetonitrile)' verbatim under compound 4n description (uses Cyrillic 'С' in original).
Molecules 2024 31(4):706 confirmed. Quote '( 3d ). Yield: 58%; Mp: 168 °C' verbatim for compound 3d.

2000_Brown_Melting Point and Molecular Symmetry.pdf legacy reference present. Table 1 contains 'cyclooctatetraene 268.5 cubane 405', confirming cubane mp 405 K. Conversion arithmetic 405 K − 273.15 = 131.85 °C is correct; plausibility OK.

J Med Chem 2013 (DOI 10.1021/jm3014162) confirmed. Quote 'The title compound was obtained as a white solid (mp 132-134 °C)' verbatim under section '1-(2,4,6-Trimethylbenzenesulfonyl)-1H-pyrrolo[2,3-c]pyridine (24c)'.

Res Chem Intermed 2022 (DOI 10.1007/s11164-022-04839-x) confirmed. Quote '( 5 l ) M.p. 101–101 °C' verbatim for compound 5l. Note: 101–101 is verbatim in paper (apparent typo of 'range' with equal endpoints).

PMC3783257 confirmed in metadata. Quote 'Philinopgenin A ( 1 ): a white powder, mp 208.5–208.5 °C' verbatim in Spectral Data section; paper's own typo of identical range endpoints reproduced faithfully.
